objective: Recenter the current session on Agent-Reach integration after CodeGraph watchlist work displaced the original search-capability objective.
original_user_goal: Integrate Panniantong/Agent-Reach.git into the Loop project to improve search capability, efficiency, quality, and continuous evolution.

deviation_causes.explanation: After the Agent-Reach work, the user explicitly authorized Brain/Studio CodeGraph watchlist sync-only closure, so subsequent 'next step' execution followed that authorized CodeGraph queue.
Loop orchestration repeatedly selected the latest produced next_round artifact instead of pinning the original Agent-Reach integration objective as the active task lock.
CodeGraph, document gates, and watchlist thresholds are valid Loop governance infrastructure, but they only support continuous evolution indirectly and do not deliver Agent-Reach search integration.
The session declaration boundary was created after several CodeGraph rounds, so it recorded status ceilings but did not prevent the earlier mainline drift.

non_claims: Agent-Reach is not accepted or integrated
Agent-Reach results are not strong RAG citations
Agent-Reach results are not written to KDS canonical Markdown
CodeGraph watchlist closure does not equal Agent-Reach search integration
